title: Eva Action Figures including Rebuild 1
wikitext:
[]: Eva Action Figures (including Rebuild) [1] Post by Coded to the Core » Wed Jun 27, 2007 2:21 pm Hey there , It doest seem a lot of people update about evangelion when it comes to figures/ Merchandise and as an Evangelion collector i always look for such stuff anyway Kaiyodo didnt waste time milking the yet to come movie , So here they are the new 2 Revol-tech's for the new eva's i'd like to note that Kaiyodo produced a Revol-tech figure for Every Single Eva unit including some rare clear ones . Also this time you can buy additional Accessories for the Eva's : http://www.1999.co.jp/dbimages/user/hobby/itbig/10060823a2.jpg http://www.1999.co.jp/dbimages/user/hobby/itbig/10060823a.jpg BTW : They come togther / Operation yashima Weapons *looking forward for that in the movies * http://www.1999.co.jp/dbimages/user/hobby/itbig/10060822a4.jpg ^ Both Eva's Thanks

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 27, 2007 2:53 pm Please don't hotlink images from other websites. It's commonly known as bandwith theft, and the original content provider gets no credit for hosting up the images. Also, for large images, it is always better to url link than image link.

[]: Post by Annihilator » Thu Jun 28, 2007 9:54 am sexeh to say the least... is that o1 with a Gatling gun?

[]: Post by Krennn » Sat Sep 15, 2007 11:29 pm Annihilator wrote: sexeh to say the least... is that o1 with a Gatling gun?

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Sep 16, 2007 2:38 am I have a bunch of pictures of them that I took at akihabara, but everywhere I looked, they were already sold out. I did buy like 5 or 6 of those trading figures, they're not that tall but not bad. I think I ended up getting almost one of each of the main characters, plus one of Maya.

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 16, 2007 5:28 am Wow, they look awesome! They're not too expensive, either (from PlayAsia.com anyway). However, I just bought Kaiyodo's 10th Anniversary eiditions of Unit01 and Unit02, so I don't think I'll be in any hurry to pick these ones up! What I really want is the recently released MP Eva that comes with the Lance of Longinus!

[]: Re: Rebuild Revoltech Action Figures Post by Zeon » Mon Sep 17, 2007 12:14 am Coded to the Core wrote: So here they are the new 2 Revol-tech's for the new eva's i'd like to note that Kaiyodo produced a Revol-tech figure for Every Single Eva unit including some rare clear ones.

[]: Post by JP » Mon Sep 17, 2007 7:08 pm Did these come out yet? I've been slowly stalking news of 01 throughout summertime. All I know is US retail is due "September 07". /eagerly waiting.

[]: Post by Coded to the Core » Fri Sep 21, 2007 12:46 pm Evamonkey : Sorry for stealing the bandwith . wont happen again . Yeah they're OUT PEOPLE! , The thing i really want is the OY Weapon set ! =D . But first i should get the Eva-00 Bandai kit .. ~~ Thanks

[]: Rebuild Revoltech action figures are already out in USA Post by V » Fri Jan 18, 2008 6:40 pm It was weird; the day after I saw Rebuild over the internet (last week), I went into a random comic store and found a Rebuild-Eva-01, a Rebuild-Eva00, and the (sold separately) positron sniper rifle and super-shield.

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Jan 18, 2008 7:14 pm What's the average price? Because I'll be damned if it's $200>!

[]: Post by Incisivis » Fri Jan 18, 2008 7:37 pm I got a Rebuild Revoltech Eva-01 in a Winnipeg comic store for $24.95 CAD. I've seen it for ten bucks more, but not much over that.

[]: Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 18, 2008 7:50 pm Wow, yet another reason I should start riding my bike into town. (For info, see Physical Exercise Thread in Off Topic Room.)

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Jan 18, 2008 8:20 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: What's the average price? Because I'll be damned if it's $200>!

[]: Post by V » Fri Jan 18, 2008 8:30 pm Incisivis wrote: I got a Rebuild Revoltech Eva-01 in a Winnipeg comic store for $24.95 CAD. I've seen it for ten bucks more, but not much over that.

[]: Post by Ironfoot » Fri Jan 18, 2008 9:43 pm Bought my new EVA-01 figure for about $25 USD as well.

[]: Post by Zeak » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:09 am There been out here for a few months http://www.minotaur.com.au/ Im not sure if there on the webpage yet. there are a few other places but thats where i got mine from. Its funny I got the unit 00 and 01 but there is a unit 03 also with the rebuild stuff on it has anyone else found it. Im looking for a unit 02 there rear as. I only found a modle of one yesterday afterdriving everywhere in melbourne.

[]: Post by JP » Wed Jan 23, 2008 1:46 pm I've had 01 rebuild version since about September now. Entertainmentearth.com is a good site.

[]: Post by Lagann » Wed Mar 25, 2009 5:35 pm Not revoltech but heres a figure of mari,i thought she had purple hair in the poster Please don't direct link, use an image hosting site instead

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Mar 25, 2009 5:43 pm Purple tinted. Not that the toys mean anything but interesting to see these apparently Rebuild figures have little Ramiel's (Rei) and a little...Israfel? Not confirmation she's in the film but interesting nonetheless.
